Gaps / TODO: Win conditions still being finalised — Altar of Dementia, Craterhoof Behemoth, Overwhelming Stampede under consideration. Cuts not yet determined.
Key Combos: Life and Limb + Sporemound (infinite Saprolings); Yedora + bounce lands + flip creatures (infinite landfall); Altar of Dementia (mill win); Craterhoof Behemoth / Overwhelming Stampede (combat win)
Notes: Brad owns and plays this deck. Mechanically unusual — his preferred style. Life and Limb interaction is central and well-understood. Do not suggest off-colour cards.
Theme / Strategy: Mono-green landfall/recursion engine. Core loop uses flip land creatures (morph/face-down as Forests), Yedora's recursion trigger, and bounce lands to generate repeated landfall triggers.
Jund land sacrifice/landfall. Sacrifice lands for value and recursion, generate tokens, win through combat.
Naya creature toolbox. Rocco tutors creatures onto the battlefield at sorcery speed based on mana paid.
Dimir zombie tribal. Wilhelt generates Decayed zombie tokens when other zombies die, enabling sacrifice loops for value.
Artifact-focused Commander deck. Speed/artifacts theme.

Mono-blue artifact stax/combo. Urza generates mana from artifacts, stax pieces lock opponents out (Winter Orb, Static Orb, Trinisphere). Combo with Isochron Scepter + Dramatic Reversal and Rings of Brighthearth.
Mono-blue spells/drakes. Talrand creates 2/2 flying Drake tokens whenever you cast an instant or sorcery.
Bant walls/defenders. Arcades lets defenders attack and draws cards when they enter. Win by attacking with high-toughness walls.
Golgari curse/sacrifice. Auntie Ool puts curses on opponents when creatures die.
Abzan enchantress. Anikthea reanimates enchantments from graveyard as creature copies.
Gruul creature beatdown. Ruric Thar punishes opponents for casting noncreature spells with 6 damage.
Abzan landfall/zombie tokens. The Necrobloom creates Zombie tokens when lands enter tapped.

Commander: Sephiroth, Fabled SOLDIER // Sephiroth, One-Winged Angel
Theme / Strategy: Mono-black Sephiroth (Final Fantasy). Likely creature-based beatdown with black value package.
Five-colour Zurgo storm/spells. Cast spells to trigger Zurgo's discard/draw ability and generate value.
Dimir zombie reanimator. The Scarab God exiles creatures from graveyards to create 4/4 Zombie copies and is hard to kill.
Temur Ureni creature spells. Earlier build of the Ureni strategy.
Five-colour sliver tribal. The First Sliver cascades into more slivers, each sharing all sliver abilities.
Orzhov spirit/oath tribal.
Dimir control/zombies. Earlier Scarab God build, likely more control-oriented than Bugface Neverdie.
Rakdos goad. Kardur forces opponent creatures to attack and triggers when opponents die in combat.
Izzet Tidus (Final Fantasy X). Earlier build of the Counter Blitz strategy.
Selesnya elf token doubling. Rhys creates elf tokens and doubles all tokens you control.
